name: SecurityLocalSetKey
title: SecurityLocalSetKey
syntax: long SecurityLocalSetKey(char keyIdentifierString[], dword keyIdentifierValue, byte newKey[], dword keyLength, dword flags)
description: Changes a key at the node.

As keys and the key handling differs from Security Source to Security Source you have to refer to the Security Source specific manual to get more information about which values you have to specify as parameters.

parameters.name: char keyIdentifierString[]
parameters.description: A string as an identifier for the key to set.

parameters.name: dword keyIdentifierValue
parameters.description: A numerical Id for the key to set.

parameters.name: byte newKey[]
parameters.description: The key to set as a byte array.

parameters.name: dword keyLength
parameters.description: The length of the new key in bytes.

parameters.name: dword flags
parameters.description: Optional flags (depending on the Security Source).

return: A Value of 1 means that the action was successful. A value less than or equal to 0 means error.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
